case_title: ZIA, SONKARLAY B.C. VS BRADLEY, HEATHER A.

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,017.64 FILED BY ZIA, SONKARLAY B.C. AS TO DEFENDANT BRADLEY, HEATHER A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-22-1998 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
